title: Log in successfully and land on the map
description: Verifies a user can log in with valid credentials and is taken to the map view as the post-login landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the user lands on the map view

title: Log out from map and return to login
description: Verifies an authenticated user can log out from the map view and is returned to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Perform the logout action
Verify the user lands on the login view

title: From login, reach the map after signing in
description: Verifies a user can go from the login page to a signed-in state and see the map page load successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the map view is displayed

title: Navigate across main pages while authenticated
description: Verifies a logged-in user can use the main navigation to move between map, stores, admin, and settings pages and each page loads.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to go to the stores page
Click the navigation item to go to the admin page
Click the navigation item to go to the settings page
Verify the settings view is displayed

title: Add a new store and see it in the list
description: Verifies a logged-in user can create a store with valid details and the new store appears in the store list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open stores management
Start adding a new store
Fill Store Alpha 101 into the store name field
Fill valid store location details into the location fields
Save the store
Verify the new store appears in the store list

title: Edit an existing store and see updated details
description: Verifies a logged-in user can edit a store and the updated details are shown in the store list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open stores management
Start adding a new store
Fill Store Edit Target into the store name field
Fill valid store location details into the location fields
Save the store
Select the store you just created from the list
Edit the store name to Store Edit Target Updated
Save changes
Verify the store list shows the updated store details

title: Search stores and view matching results
description: Verifies a logged-in user can search stores and see the list update to show only matching stores.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open stores management
Fill a store name or location query into the store search field
Verify the store list shows results matching the entered query

title: Delete a store and confirm it is removed
description: Verifies a logged-in user can delete a store and it no longer appears in the store list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open stores management
Start adding a new store
Fill Store Delete Target into the store name field
Fill valid store location details into the location fields
Save the store
Select the store you just created from the list
Initiate deleting the selected store
Confirm the delete action
Verify the deleted store no longer appears in the store list

title: View global heatmap and summary statistics as admin
description: Verifies an admin can access the admin dashboard and sees both the global heatmap visualization and summary statistics rendered.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the admin dashboard
Verify a global heatmap visualization is displayed
Verify summary statistics are displayed

title: Add a new user with valid details
description: Verifies an admin can create a new user with valid required fields and the new user appears in the users list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to go to the admin page
Start adding a new user
Fill in the user name field with Test User A
Fill in the user email field with test.user.a@example.com
Select an appropriate role for the new user
Save the new user
Verify the new user appears in the users list

title: Update global heatmap and statistics using dashboard controls
description: Verifies that using a dashboard control on the admin dashboard updates both the global heatmap visualization and the summary statistics.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the admin dashboard
Select a different value in a dashboard filter control (such as timeframe or area)
Verify the global heatmap visualization reflects the updated filter selection
Verify the summary statistics reflect the updated filter selection

title: Edit an existing user and see changes reflected in the list
description: Verifies an admin can update an existing user and the updated details are reflected in the users list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to go to the admin page
Start adding a new user
Fill in the user name field with Edit Me User
Fill in the user email field with edit.me.user@example.com
Select an appropriate role for the new user
Save the new user
Select the created user from the list
Update the user name field with Edited User Name
Save changes
Verify the users list shows the updated user details

title: Search for a user from the admin dashboard
description: Verifies an admin can search by name or email on the admin dashboard and see a filtered list of matching users.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to go to the admin page
Fill a search term into the user search field
Submit or apply the search
Verify the user list updates to show matching results

title: Delete a user and verify it is removed
description: Verifies an admin can delete a user and the user no longer appears in the users list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to go to the admin page
Start adding a new user
Fill in the user name field with Delete Me User
Fill in the user email field with delete.me.user@example.com
Select an appropriate role for the new user
Save the new user
Select the created user from the list
Delete the user
Verify the deleted user is no longer present in the users list

title: Navigate between admin dashboard and stores via app navigation
description: Verifies an admin can navigate from the admin dashboard to stores and return using in-app navigation with the admin dashboard still accessible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the admin dashboard
Click the navigation link to stores
Click the navigation link to the admin dashboard
Verify a global heatmap visualization is displayed

title: Persist admin dashboard filter selection during navigation within session
description: Verifies that after changing a dashboard filter, navigating away and back within the same session preserves the selected filter and view.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the admin dashboard
Select a different value in a dashboard filter control (such as timeframe or area)
Click the navigation link to map
Click the navigation link to the admin dashboard
Verify the dashboard shows the previously selected filter value

title: Reject incorrect credentials
description: Verifies login with incorrect credentials shows an authentication failure message and the user is not logged in.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with invalid.user@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication failure message is visible
Verify the user remains on the login view

title: Prevent saving a store when required fields are missing
description: Verifies the store form shows validation and does not create a store when required fields are empty.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill {{LOGIN_USER}} into the username field
Fill {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to open stores management
Start adding a new store
Leave required store fields empty
Attempt to save the store
Verify a required-field validation error is visible
Verify no new store is added to the store list

title: Show required-field validation on empty login submit
description: Verifies submitting the login form with empty required fields shows validation errors and does not log the user in.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Submit the login form
Verify required-field validation errors are visible
Verify the user remains on the login view

title: Admin dashboard handles empty-data state gracefully
description: Verifies the admin dashboard shows a clear empty state when there is no data for the current dashboard filters while still rendering the dashboard layout.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the admin dashboard
Select a filter combination intended to result in no matching data (such as a restrictive timeframe or area)
Verify an empty state message is visible for the dashboard data
Verify the dashboard remains usable with controls still available

title: Block creating a user when required fields are missing
description: Verifies the add-user form enforces required fields by showing validation errors and not creating the user.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation item to go to the admin page
Start adding a new user
Leave required fields empty
Attempt to save the new user
Verify validation errors are visible
Verify the add-user form remains open
